title: Strawberry Preserves
body:
The simplest preserves are the best. Use only fully ripe local berries; the difference is enormous.

· 4 lb fresh ripe strawberries, hulled
· 4 cups sugar
· Juice of 1 lemon

source.label: Fannie Merritt Farmer · The Boston Cooking-School Cook Book · 1896
source.ref: Fannie Merritt Farmer · The Boston Cooking-School Cook Book · 1896
